name: DISACCHARIDASE DEFICIENCY
definition: enzyme deficiencies for any of the disaccharides (maltose, lactose, etc.)
dominant_finding: abnormal small bowel series done with lactose (50 g added to 600 cm3 of barium suspension)
discriminating_features: normal small bowel series without added lactose
abnormal small bowel series done with lactose (50 g added to 600 cm3 of barium suspension)

general: normal small bowel series without added lactose
abnormal small bowel series done with lactose (50 g added to 600 cm3 of barium suspension)
